title: Concept Graph (Semantic)
description: Typed-edge concept graph emitted alongside concept_graph.json. Edges carry a type (prerequisite | is-a | related-to) and per-edge provenance. See docs/concept-graph/typed-edges.md for rule descriptions and precedence.

rule_versions.description: Map of rule name -> version integer for the rules that fired in this run.

run_id.description: Pipeline run that produced this node (REC-PRV-01, Worker P Wave 4.1). Sourced from the active DecisionCapture instance's run_id. Always populated on new runs; legacy nodes without this field still validate.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the node was emitted (REC-PRV-01, Worker P Wave 4.1). Equal to the artifact-level generated_at for a given run. Always populated on new runs; legacy nodes without this field still validate.

run_id.description: Pipeline run that produced this edge (REC-PRV-01, Worker P Wave 4.1). Sourced from the active DecisionCapture instance's run_id. Always populated on new runs; legacy edges without this field still validate.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the edge was emitted (REC-PRV-01, Worker P Wave 4.1). Equal to the artifact-level generated_at for a given run. Always populated on new runs; legacy edges without this field still validate.
